description_long: This is a modern two-seater couch featuring a light wood frame with clean, angular lines and a minimalist aesthetic. The seat and backrest are both generously cushioned with light gray fabric upholstery, providing a soft and inviting appearance. The backrest is divided into two distinct, plush sections, while the seat cushion is a single, wide piece. The armrests are flat, wide, and constructed from the same light wood as the frame, extending outward for added comfort and style. The rear of the couch displays a slatted wooden support structure, adding visual interest and structural integrity. This piece is well-suited for urban parks, public waiting areas, or contemporary outdoor lounges.
description: A modern two-seater couch with a light wood frame, wide flat armrests, and plush light gray cushions. The design is minimalist and inviting, with a slatted wooden back and soft fabric upholstery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, flat wooden armrests, two plush back cushions, and a single seat cushion.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the backrest and seat cushions, as well as the flat wooden armrest and sturdy leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the slatted wooden back support and the full width of the back cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and cushion thickness, with clear visibility of the frame's construction.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, attached back cushions divided at the center and one wide, continuous seat cushion; no accent or throw pillows visible.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, uniform texture and no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
attribute_leg_style: Exposed, straight wooden legs integrated into the frame, medium height, with a simple rectangular profile.
attribute_armrest_design: Flat, wide, and straight wooden armrests at seat height, extending outward from the frame with a minimalist design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-high, divided backrest with two attached, plush cushions; structure is continuous with the frame and visually separated at the center.
